---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new module, doc section, or template enhancement for dev-models.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. (e.g. "Missing FastAPI migration guide")

**Describe the solution you'd like**
Details on the new language/framework or section.

**Additional context**
Links to similar content in other modules (e.g. Java Spring Boot 4).
